creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
edwin       2007-09-30 06:09:51 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    mail/imap-uw         Makefile 
  Added files:
    mail/imap-uw/files   patch-src__imapd__imapd.8 
                         patch-src__ipopd__ipopd.8 
  Log:
  error in man page for imapd of mail/imap-uw
  
          If you install the imap-wu port and read the imapd man page
          it shows under SYNOPSIS that imapd is installed in the
          directory /usr/etc/imapd, however the port install the
          binary under /usr/local/libexec
  
  Also fixed for ipopd.8
  
  PR:             ports/102060
  Submitted by:   Jan Riedinger <jan@master.swk.sns.eu>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.83      +1 -1      ports/mail/imap-uw/Makefile
  1.1       +11 -0     ports/mail/imap-uw/files/patch-src__imapd__imapd.8 (new)
  1.1       +14 -0     ports/mail/imap-uw/files/patch-src__ipopd__ipopd.8 (new)
